name: Pennzoil 400 presented by Jiffy Lube
comments: Kyle Larson won the Pennzoil 400 at Las Vegas Motor Speedway, his 24th career victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the No. 41 (backup car) and Nos. 1, 51 (unapproved adjustments) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty.

car.sponsors: Rush Trucks Center/Black Rifle Coffee/Ranger Boats
